description_long: This is a compact, single-engine military-style airplane with a camouflage paint scheme of green and brown, accented by roundels and fin flashes reminiscent of British Royal Air Force markings. The fuselage is short and rounded, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a multi-panel canopy. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each bearing roundels, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer with a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is a tricycle configuration, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The propeller is not visible, suggesting a jet or internal engine, and the overall design is stylized and simplified, suitable for visual representation in urban or game environments.
description: A small, camouflaged military-style airplane with a rounded fuselage, low straight wings, and British-style markings. It features a forward enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded nose, forward cockpit, single nose wheel, and RAF-style markings on the fuselage and wing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight wings, single vertical stabilizer, and the absence of a visible propeller.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the main landing gear and camouflage pattern.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cockpit canopy, nose wheel, and the full wingspan with roundels on each wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, unswept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel canopy, likely single-seat.
